name: E-Commerce Checkout
description: Multi-step checkout flow with shipping, payment, and order confirmation. Minimal chrome for a focused, distraction-free purchase experience.

page_briefs.checkout: Three-step checkout wizard with a horizontal stepper at top showing Shipping, Payment, and Review steps. Each step renders structured form sections: Step 1 has address fields with autocomplete; Step 2 has card input with saved-payment selector; Step 3 has order summary with line items, totals, and a Place Order button. Minimal header with logo and cart summary only.

shells.minimal-header: Minimal header with logo and cart summary, no navigation distractions
